caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt, light-colored suspenders, a red bow tie, and a large, grey, pointed wig sits in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and glasses, speaking into a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a wall decorated with several framed photographs and clothing items, including a white shirt and a black garment on a mannequin. The on-screen graphics include a logo that reads "TALKJOY PODCAST" and text that says "GOSS TALK JOY." Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, subtly moving his mouth and head as he speaks, while the camera angle and background remain static.
